# crates

Workspace member crates for Attractor system. Contains attractor-web Leptos SSR/hydrate application. References attractor-pipeline, attractor-dot, attractor-types per its Cargo.toml.

## Subdirectories

- [attractor-web/](./attractor-web/): Leptos v0.7 SSR/hydrate web interface. Renders project sidebar, document viewer with live reload, pipeline execution panel, WebSocket terminals via Axum backend.
